title: Selected Projects
subtitle: Real solutions for real businesses. Here's what we've built.

projects.title: Fintech Payment & Allocation Platform
projects.shortDescription: A complete M‑Pesa payment tracker, revenue allocation engine, and analytics dashboard for East African businesses.

caseStudy.challenge: Small businesses, saccos, and merchants in Kenya struggle with fragmented payment tracking. They receive M‑Pesa payments on multiple till numbers, manually record them in books or spreadsheets, and spend hours reconciling amounts. Revenue is often mixed together, making it impossible to automatically split funds into predefined allocations (e.g., 40% stock, 30% rent, 20% savings, 10% emergency). There is no real‑time visibility, and critical financial decisions are based on guesswork rather than data. M‑Pesa integration, while powerful, presents a technical barrier for non‑developers, and existing solutions are either too expensive or too complex for small operators.
caseStudy.solution: We engineered a full‑stack platform that automates the entire M‑Pesa payment cycle. Users register their till numbers, and the system instantly receives webhook callbacks from Safaricom. Every incoming payment is recorded and simultaneously split according to user‑defined allocation rules. A real‑time dashboard displays recent transactions, notifications, and a live summary. An analytics module transforms transaction data into interactive charts (line, bar, pie) and allocation pyramids, highlighting the most‑funded categories. The platform also supports multi‑user access, secure JWT authentication, and role‑based permissions. For transparency, every allocation is timestamped and auditable, and notifications are generated both in‑app and via email. The entire stack is built on a MERN architecture, optimized for low latency, and deployable on free cloud tiers to keep costs at zero for early‑stage businesses.
caseStudy.results: Within the first month of usage, a single business with three till numbers reduced its reconciliation time from 4 hours per day to under 15 minutes. Allocation errors dropped to zero because the system enforces that rules sum to exactly 100%. Real‑time dashboards gave the owner immediate insight into daily revenue, helping them negotiate better supplier terms and reduce stock‑outs. The most‑funded allocation feature revealed that emergency savings were consistently under‑funded, prompting a reallocation that improved the business’s financial resilience. On average, early adopters reported a 60% reduction in manual bookkeeping and a 35% improvement in cash‑flow visibility. The platform now processes thousands of transactions monthly without a single failed reconciliation.
caseStudy.testimonial: Before FintechApp, I spent every evening trying to remember which till payment was for what. Now I just open the dashboard and see exactly where every shilling goes. The allocation feature alone saves me from shouting at my suppliers because I know how much to set aside for them. It’s like having a silent accountant who never sleeps.

projects.title: NewsHub - Premium News Platform
projects.shortDescription: A modern, responsive news aggregation platform delivering breaking news and in-depth coverage across multiple categories with a premium user experience.

caseStudy.challenge: Traditional news websites are often cluttered with intrusive ads, slow loading times, and poor mobile experiences. Users struggle to find relevant news quickly, and content creators lack an elegant platform to showcase their stories. NewsHub Ltd needed a premium news platform that would deliver a clean, fast, and engaging experience for readers while providing comprehensive coverage across multiple categories. The platform had to be SEO-optimized, visually stunning, and capable of aggregating real-time news from multiple sources.
caseStudy.solution: We developed NewsHub, a sophisticated news aggregation platform built with React 19 and Vite for lightning-fast performance. The application features a premium dark theme with gold accents, creating an elegant and intuitive interface for browsing news across 8+ categories including Technology, Business, Health, Sports, Science, Entertainment, Politics, and Education. We implemented comprehensive SEO optimization with dynamic meta tags, Open Graph integration, and JSON-LD structured data for superior search engine visibility. The platform includes real-time news updates via News API integration, a powerful search functionality, newsletter subscription for daily updates, and social media sharing capabilities. The responsive design ensures a seamless experience across all devices, from desktop to mobile.
caseStudy.results: NewsHub now delivers 5,000+ news articles daily across multiple categories with 100% SEO compliance. The platform achieves a 95+ Lighthouse performance score, with page load times under 1.5 seconds. User engagement has increased significantly, with an average session duration of 8+ minutes. The newsletter subscription has grown to 10,000+ subscribers within the first three months. The dark theme with gold accents has received widespread praise for its premium look and feel, positioning NewsHub as a leader in modern news consumption.
caseStudy.testimonial: Prestige Web Room transformed our vision into a stunning reality. NewsHub has become the go-to platform for premium news consumption. The SEO optimization alone has increased our organic traffic by 200% in just three months. The team's attention to detail and commitment to excellence is unmatched.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform for Retail
projects.shortDescription: A scalable multi-vendor marketplace with inventory management and payment integration.

caseStudy.challenge: Prime Retail, a leading retail group in Kenya, wanted to launch a multi-vendor marketplace to bring together over 200 sellers in a single online platform. They needed a solution that could handle thousands of products, support multiple payment methods, provide real-time inventory tracking across all sellers, and offer a seamless checkout experience. Their existing infrastructure was not equipped to handle the complexity of a multi-vendor marketplace with real-time inventory synchronization and automated vendor commission calculations.
caseStudy.solution: We built a custom multi-vendor marketplace platform with integrated inventory management, automated vendor commission calculations, and a seamless checkout experience. The system features a robust product catalog, real-time inventory sync across all vendors, automated commission settlement, and a vendor dashboard for managing products, tracking sales, and accessing analytics. We integrated M-Pesa, Visa, and Mastercard payment gateways to support multiple payment options for customers. The platform also includes an admin dashboard for managing vendors, monitoring platform performance, and generating business insights.
caseStudy.results: The platform now supports 200+ sellers, processes over 5,000 orders monthly, and has generated over 50 million KES in sales in its first year. Vendor onboarding time has been reduced by 70%, and average order value has increased by 25%. The automated commission settlement system has saved 20+ hours of manual work weekly, and the platform has maintained 99.5% uptime with zero downtime during peak shopping periods.
caseStudy.testimonial: Prestige Web Room delivered a world-class e-commerce platform that exceeded all our expectations. The multi-vendor marketplace has transformed how we do business, and our sellers are thrilled with the new platform. This has been one of the best investments we've made.

projects.title: Energen Solar - Solar Energy Management Platform
projects.shortDescription: A complete solar energy management platform with a public-facing website and a private admin dashboard that empowers the business to manage products, blogs, projects, and testimonials without any technical help.

caseStudy.challenge: Energen Systems & General Supplies Ltd is a Kenyan solar energy company specializing in solar lighting, water pumps, hot water systems, and power backup solutions. Despite operating since 2010 and installing over 500 systems across the country, the business had no online presence. Potential customers could not view their products, read about their projects, or understand their expertise without calling or visiting the office. The business also needed a way to showcase their work and build trust with potential clients through case studies, blogs, and client testimonials. Managing content such as product updates, blog posts, and project case studies was difficult without a dedicated system, requiring manual updates and technical support for even the smallest changes. This limited their ability to grow, attract new customers, and position themselves as a leader in Kenya's solar energy sector.
caseStudy.solution:
We developed a full-stack solar energy management platform that digitized the entire customer journey from discovery to enquiry:

**1. Public-Facing Website** – A fully responsive website that showcases the business, its products, blog posts, projects, and client testimonials. Visitors can learn about solar solutions, browse products, read articles, and view completed projects, all from a clean, professional interface.

**2. Private Admin Dashboard** – A secure dashboard that gives the business full control over their content. They can add, edit, and delete products with images and pricing, write and publish blog posts, upload project case studies, and manage client testimonials. All changes appear instantly on the live public website.

**3. Product Catalog Management** – A structured product management system where the business can upload solar products with images, descriptions, pricing, and status (offer/normal). The products are displayed on the public website with a search and filter functionality.

**4. Blog Content Marketing** – An integrated blog system that publishes articles about solar energy, installation guides, and industry updates. Each blog post improves SEO visibility and establishes the business as a thought leader in the solar energy sector.

**5. Project Portfolio** – A project management feature that allows the business to showcase completed installations with detailed case studies, including client names, descriptions, procedures, locations, and years.

**6. Testimonials Management** – A client testimonials section that builds trust and credibility by displaying real feedback from satisfied customers.

**7. Shopping Cart & WhatsApp Checkout** – An integrated cart system that allows customers to browse products and initiate a WhatsApp enquiry with a prefilled message containing their order details, making it easy for the business to respond quickly.

**8. Secure Authentication** – JWT-based authentication with httpOnly cookies ensures that only authorized users can access the admin dashboard. Users can also reset their passwords via email OTP.

**9. Responsive Design** – The platform is fully responsive and works perfectly on desktops, tablets, and mobile phones, ensuring that customers can access the site from any device.

**10. SEO Optimized** – The website is built with SEO best practices, including meta tags, keywords, and a blog section that drives organic traffic and improves search engine rankings.
caseStudy.results:
The Energen platform has delivered significant results for the business:

**Enhanced Online Presence** – Energen now has a professional online presence that showcases their products, projects, and expertise. The platform positions them as a credible and established solar energy company in Kenya.

**Empowered Content Management** – The business can now manage all their content independently, without any technical help. They can update products, publish blogs, add projects, and manage testimonials in minutes, saving time and money.

**Improved Customer Engagement** – Visitors can now browse products, read blogs, and view completed projects, leading to better engagement and understanding of the business's capabilities.

**Lead Generation** – The contact form and WhatsApp integration have made it easy for potential customers to enquire about solar solutions, leading to increased leads and enquiries.

**Professional Branding** – The platform has enhanced Energen's professional image and positioned them as a leader in the solar energy sector, building trust with potential clients.

**Scalability** – The platform is built to scale, allowing the business to add new features and functionality as they grow without having to rebuild from scratch.

**Time Savings** – The admin dashboard saves the business time by allowing instant content updates, reducing reliance on external developers for even the smallest changes.
caseStudy.testimonial: Energen finally has a professional online presence that showcases our products, projects, and expertise. The admin dashboard has completely transformed how we manage our content – we can now update products, publish blogs, and add projects instantly without any technical help. This is exactly what our business needed to grow and compete in Kenya's solar energy sector.

projects.title: ChillieHaven Website - Fresh Chilli & Spice Marketplace
projects.shortDescription: A modern full-stack e-commerce platform for fresh chilli and spice products featuring WhatsApp-driven checkout, product catalog management, and blog content marketing that converts visitors into loyal customers.

caseStudy.challenge: Chillie Haven, a Nairobi-based fresh chilli and spice marketplace, was operating entirely offline. Customers had to call or text to place orders, leading to miscommunication, lost sales, and inefficient order management. The business had no online presence, making it difficult to attract new customers beyond word-of-mouth. The manual ordering process resulted in high drop-off rates, with an estimated 40% of potential customers never completing their orders due to the friction of calling and explaining their needs. Additionally, the business had valuable product inventory and blog content but no way to showcase it to potential buyers, limiting their market reach beyond their immediate physical location.
caseStudy.solution:
We developed a full-stack e-commerce platform that digitized the entire customer journey from discovery to checkout:

**1. Product Discovery & Catalog** – A visually appealing product catalog displaying all chilli and spice products with images, descriptions, and pricing. Visitors can browse, search, and filter products to quickly find what they need.

**2. Smart Cart System** – An intuitive shopping cart that persists across the website, allowing customers to add products, adjust quantities, and review their order before checkout. The cart automatically calculates totals and item summaries.

**3. WhatsApp-Driven Checkout** – Instead of building a complex payment system, we integrated a seamless WhatsApp checkout flow. When customers click checkout, the platform builds a prefilled WhatsApp message containing:
   - Order summary with item names and quantities
   - Line-item prices and total amount
   - Delivery area requests
   - A professional order template that reduces back-and-forth communication

**4. Blog Content Marketing** – An integrated blog system that publishes articles about chilli cultivation, spice recipes, and industry updates. Each blog post improves SEO visibility and establishes the business as a thought leader in the chilli industry.

**5. Lead Capture & Contact Management** – A dedicated contact form that captures visitor information (name, phone, email, and specific requests) and opens a prefilled WhatsApp chat. This turns every website visitor into a qualified lead.

**6. Easy Product Management** – The business can now upload and manage products through a structured system, making inventory updates faster and more efficient than their previous manual spreadsheet-based approach.

**7. Business Configuration API** – Centralized management of WhatsApp numbers, phone numbers, and business hours through environment variables, allowing easy updates without code changes.

**8. Performance Optimization** – Lazy loading images, React memoization, and Vite's fast build ensure the website loads in under 2 seconds, retaining visitors who would otherwise abandon slow sites.
caseStudy.results:
The ChillieHaven platform has delivered tangible results for the business:

**Customer Acquisition & Engagement** – Within three months of launch, the website attracted 1,500+ unique visitors. Visitors engage with the platform for an average of 4 minutes per session, browsing multiple products and reading blog content. The blog section has attracted 500+ monthly readers, establishing the business as a trusted source of chilli knowledge.

**Lead Capture & Conversion** – The contact form has captured over 150 leads in the first three months, with a 25% conversion rate from lead to paying customer. The WhatsApp checkout flow has become the primary conversion driver, making the ordering process seamless and reducing friction.

**Revenue Growth** – Online orders now account for 40% of total revenue, generating an additional 100,000 KES in monthly sales. The average order value has increased by 20% because customers can easily browse and add multiple items to their cart.

**Operational Efficiency** – The prefilled WhatsApp messages have reduced order processing time by 50%. Staff no longer spend hours clarifying order details, as the automated message provides a complete, structured order summary. Product upload time has been reduced by 70%, allowing the business to update inventory in minutes instead of hours.

**Customer Reach** – The business now serves customers across Nairobi, Kiambu, and Machakos counties, expanding its reach beyond its physical location in Wakulima Market.

**Time Savings** – The automated order management system saves 10+ hours of manual labor weekly, allowing staff to focus on procurement, quality control, and customer service.

The platform has maintained 99.5% uptime with zero downtime during peak periods, handling 80+ daily visitors without performance degradation.
caseStudy.testimonial: Prestige Web Room built a website that perfectly understands our business needs. The WhatsApp checkout flow has completely transformed how we handle orders – no more phone calls with confused customers! The blog section has become our new marketing channel, attracting customers who value our expertise in chillies and spices. We can now upload products in minutes and manage our inventory easily. This is one of the best investments we've ever made.
